title: synelcosciadium carmeli
side_effects: Synelcosciadium carmeli can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Ingesting the plant can also cause stomach problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as abdominal pain. Improper use may also lead to interactions with medications, potentially causing dizziness, fatigue, and headaches. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of the plant can even cause liver or kidney damage, emphasizing the importance of proper medical guidance and handling.
